statement: Opening Range Breakout (ORB): enter long when price closes above the first-15-minute high, enter short when price closes below the first-15-minute low. Stop at the opposite end of the opening range. Target 1.5x range size. Exit all positions by 3 PM. Strategy works consistently on SPY / liquid ETFs on a 5-minute chart.
test_type_justification: Claim describes a complete intraday trading strategy with defined entry, exit, stop, and target rules — requires full strategy backtest, not single-indicator validation.
